task: Block 5 — List(simple+risk) vs Table(detailed) + Assignment bands with unassigned-on-top
details: DispatchBoard.tsx: board sub-view toggle (List / Table / Assignment) via ?board= URL param.
List = simple cols (Load/Customer/Unit/Driver/Lane/Delivery/Risk/Status) with blended ETA risk tier + at-risk flag; unassigned loads sorted on top.
Table = detailed superset adding WO#, Commodity, Lane, Linehaul, Flag (Unit-first column order).
Assignment = stacked bands: Unassigned Units (cover first) → Booked loads (reserve-a-load, Doc-Compliance gate) → Assigned units.
Inline quicksave pickers preserved for unit/driver assignment on load rows.
